title: GhJSON Extension: gh.filepath (v1.0)
description: Extension for the Grasshopper File Path floating parameter. Captures the file filter and behaviour flags so the component can be restored without relying on generic reflection-based state.

fileFilter.description: File picker filter string, e.g. 'All files|*.*' or 'JSON files|*.json'.

expireOnFileEvent.description: When true, the component expires its solution when the referenced file changes on disk.
